options.name: -clock
options.description: Removes the data check with a related (-from) pin event that is triggered by the specified clock

options.name: -fall_from
options.description: Removes checks at the falling edge of the signal on the from pins

options.name: -fall_to
options.description: Removes the falling edge of the signal on the to pins

options.name: -from
options.description: Removes checks for both the rising and the falling edges

options.name: -hold
options.description: Data check to be removed is for hold check

options.name: -rise_from
options.description: Removes checks at the rising edge of the signal on the from pins

options.name: -rise_to
options.description: Removes the rising edge of the signal on the from pins

options.name: -setup
options.description: Data check to be removed is for setup check

options.name: -to
options.description: Removes both the rising and the falling edges
